Asking Price: $2,100,000
Cash Flow: $350,000
Gross Revenue: $780,000
Located in Hill Country, TX
15 acres, 45 RV sites, 12 cabins
Listed 45 days ago
This well-established campground sits on 15 acres of lakefront property in the Texas Hill Country. Features include 45 full-hookup RV sites, 12 rustic cabins, a general store, laundry facilities, and a boat ramp. Consistent year-round occupancy averaging 78%.

Listed 30 days ago
